name_en: M61697 Grey Monogram Eclipse! Chip Edition, BRAZZA Known for exquisite craftsmanship and rare design, this special leather combines technological innovation with classic style. Grey Monogram Eclipse suit jacket, highlighting the presence of the Louis Vuitton world. The wallet features a clever and unique interior design with various pockets and credit card slots. Size: 19x10.
